response: Which wall socket should you use for a red US plug: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a red US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
